text.message: my setup is not great man

pulled vp so cant even protect myself
ur currently winning so i stole from u

you dont get those when youre miles ahead
extortion attempts should be punished imho
part of the game is robbing
part of the game is lying
if you cant handle it this game is not for u
if you cant handle lies it's not for you

lying is core to the game
otherwise every card would be face up
no worries orange wont get far in the game
strategy is why the cards are not shown
12 cards just buy ur devs and pass man
oj take road when you have a moment
he keeps getting 9 blocks off lol

think i just gotta hold and get lucky

i dont think thats the right play but u do u
but hes the luckiest of them all
you think 4:1ing my wood is the play?
when i need to get road?
no one else is taking it
no one trading rn lets go
